name: Perimeter Explorer

teachesLevels.label: Calculate and infer perimeters of 2D shapes using metric units
teachesLevels.syllabusDescription: Selects and uses the appropriate unit and device to measure lengths and distances including perimeters.

description:
Build: __BUILD_STAMP__

Perimeter Explorer is a park-track runner game where students trace the outside boundary of a shape, add side lengths into a lap total, and answer perimeter or missing-side questions using metric units.
